TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Pa-si-li-ya Ś∑īŤ•ŅŚą©šļě == Pa-si-li-ya "Pu-taw-ya a kamu: Bras√≠lia (b…ĺa'zilj…ź)", u kamuac Pa-si-li-ya. u Pa-si a tukay, itida i talakaw nu buyu' caycaylimwal a pa-si buyuan, u Lin-he-kuo-ciw-ke kapulungan nu kitaki kahetikan nu babalak. Pa-si-li-ya u kitakid nu satabakiay tusep a se-ci nu nikadanay nisangaan a tukay. Ś∑īŤ•ŅŚą©šļě(ŤĎ°ŤźĄÁČôŤ™ě:Bras√≠lia (b…ĺa'zilj…ź)), . amica tu lingatu limwan ku tademaw a nipisikian tu kanadtal a cen-ce tatelungan, nika katukuh tu tusepcaysiw mihcaan, tademaw nu Pa-si-li-ya milakuuyt tu 3,000,000 ku tademaw,mapataayaw tu sakatulu nu Pa-si a tukayan, La-men a sakalima nu tukay, pulung nu sakaudip sakatulu nu Pa-si, La-men sakalima, i La-men tukayan a tademaw nu pulung a sakasilaculan nu sakaudip u satalakaway, nu 25,500 kalisiw nu amuhaun. ,Áāļ25,500ÁĺéŚÖÉ. patideng tina tukayan nu Pa-si-li-ya i caysiwlimnum katukuh caysiwlimsep, u baluhay a niyadu'an, mikiyaku tu tukay a wayway tu nipatideng, namahida saicelang sa ku balucu' a misiki tina papatidengan atu amelik macunus ku tademaw a nikasinganganan, caysiwnumsep mihcaan sepat a bulad tucay demiad, mangalay pakaamelik ku Pa-si tu nikalahatan, u tawyaay nu tukay Li-ye-ze-ne-lu mabulaw taydan i Pa-si-li-ya. . kiyaku tu tukay Ť¶ŹŚäÉŚüéŚłā Pa-si-li-ya miida tu kiyaku nu tukay atu kiyaku a nipahetikan nu babalaki a nikatengilan, sakamu satu " caysiwlimnem mihcaan Pa-si-li-ya papatidengan u Pa-si a tatelungan, cinida han tu nisikian a sakahemekan. mikiyakuay tu tukay a tademaw ci Lu-si-aw.Ke-se-ta atu ci Aw-se-ka.Ni-may-ye u misikiay tu tukay a tademaw, namaka niyadu'an atu sin-cen kitidaan a nipisangaan katukuh tu nipatideng tu lumaan a nikasilacan, Pa-si-li-ya sakamusa mahida u wayway nu ayam. mahida patahekalay namakatukay a sungaay a nabalucuan a nisikian, duma satu nisangaan tu luma' nu sihu sakahemekan nu nabalucuan sa." ." likisi ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ saan i likisi Pa-si naitida i Sa-e-wa-tuo atu Li-yu-ze-ne-lu tusa a sadipasay nu tukay a malatukay. caysiwlimnem mihcaan Pa-si cung-tun ci Zu-say-li-nuo. Ku-pi-ci-ke sakamusa a patideng tu Pa-si-li-ya. maminsangan mikiyaku tu tukay a tademaw ci Lu-si-aw. Ke-se-ta "L√ļcio Costa", macimacian a nikapulungan a nisangaan u misangaay a tademaw ci Aw-se-ka. Ni-may-ye " pasu satalakaway a pikaygian, cung-tun-hu, satalakaway a huing, sakay hekalan pu, se-hua-pu, luma nu cung-tun, tabakiay a kiukay", misikiay tu sakay hekalan ci Roberto Burle Marx. tukay a nipisikian u nidatengan ni Ke-pi ku sapalekal. nipatidengan nu Pa-si-li-ya namaka caysiwlimnem mihcaan , katukau i caysiwnemsep mihcaan a mahedek, sipcay a buladan a mahedek. sipakay pabaw a miadih mahida u hikuki atu adipapang ku wayway adihan. ninatukay pangangan han u Lin-pang tukay, nu madayumay a nakamuan han u " BSB". (L√ļcio Costa), Roberto Burle Marx. ",śąĖÁį°Á®Ī"BSB". kitidaan ŚúįÁźÜ pa-si-li-ya kitidaan nu timulan 15¬į45 "15.75¬į", nutipan 47¬į57 "47.95¬į", itida i sakalecad nu talakawan ceysepsepsep a Pa-si teban nu Ke-ya-se-cuo nu buyuan, Ma-la-ni-ni-wung sauwac atu Wi-e-de sauwac nu kalalitemuah a masangkakuay nu kitidaan. caysiwwalpic mihcaan caytu bulad pitu a demiad, Lin-he-kuo ciaw-ke-wen-cu mihapu pa-si-li-ya u liwan nu babalaki a lalangawan nu kitakidan. 60 caysiwnumsep mihcaan mikilul tu Lan-pang-cen-hu ce-li-ye-ze-nia-lu mabulaw taydan i Pa-si-li-yu a kun-mu-ing, u nuheni atu iluc itida namin nu macian a sikusia mueneng, nuayawan nu "Paranoa" a banaw nu ayawan a "Lago Sul" u nucanan a kanatalan itida i Pa-si nu tapang a kitidaan atu tapang nu hekal a sikusia mueneng. tawya patidengay tinabaluhay nu mikuliay a tademaw atu iluc itida namin mueneng i Wi-sin-cen, idaw ku limaay nu Wi-sin-cen malakuuy tu caywang nu tademawan, satabakiay nu Wi-sin-cen u Taguatinga. duma hantu , idaw ku dumaay a tademaw itida i milawaay tu Pa-si-li-ya a "Goi√°s" niyaduan,pasu "Agua Clara". 1960 ,ParanoaśĻĖŚįćŚ≤łÁöĄLago Sul Taguatinga. Goi√°sŚ∑ěŚüéťéģ,Ś¶āAgua Clara. siki Ť®≠Ť®ą Ke-se-ta u Pa-si-li-ya kakapah ku nipikiyaku, nipatuduan tu kitidaan nu paylumaluma' atu sasiwbayan a nikakenihan, a caay patideng tu kakulian a kitidaan, atu u canan nu sasangaan tu luma' aycuwa hakiya paluma' atu talakaw nu nisangaan tu luma'an. ci Ke-se-ta pacici i Pa-si-li-ya nu hekalan tatenga mahida u adipapang, nika hatidaay tu nu tademaw mahida u hikuki sa. "hikuki" a "udip" u sihu kuyda, kuo-hua atu duma nu sihuan nu pulung a papatidengan tu luma', idaw ku nisikian ni Ni-may ku sakay cilacilaan a kiwkay. i macimacian idaw ku talakaway nu tilibian, i pabaw han maadih nu mita ku nabakuan atu banaw nu waywayan. "sakubat" pangangan han timul atu amis nu sakubatan, tanayu' makaala tu pitu a kunlian. ,ŚźĄÁīĄ7ŚÖ¨ťáĆťē∑. cacay nu ahebalay a kaw-su' dadan militin tu timul amis nu sakubatan, teban milawit tu teban nu pangiluan nu basu, itida han u gingku atu tatayda mukan tu pahan a patiyamay. tepal nu tabakiay a dadan yudah ku lumaluma'an, u siwbay ku mikenihay, langdaway atu kilakilangan sakaydihan sa. micapi tu pahikukian idaw ku aadupan nu aidangan. Ta-se-kun, kan-le-hua kapahay nu luma'an itida i tepal nu banaw, idaw ku cacay micidekay a aaidangan. . sakaudip Á∂ďśŅü saan ku mese sasapalitaan a sakaudip u satekesay nu macian, tusepcaytu mihcaan Pa-si-li-ya u sakay kitakidan u saka siplim nu satekesay a tukayan, mahida u tusepcaysep mihcaan u saka pitu a bataan nu kitidaan , itini i Sen-paw-luo han sabaw tusa atu Li-ye-ze'-nei-lu saka sabaw tulu. (Á¨¨13)šĻčŚĺĆ. #%E5%9C%B0%E7%90%86
S.PHON: == pa-si-r~…ĺi-ja **** == pa-si-r~…ĺi-ja "pu-taw-ja a kamu: bras*r~…ĺia (b…ĺa Ē~ °zir~…ĺj*)", u kamua ¶ pa-si-r~…ĺi-ja. u pa-si a tukaj, itida i tar~…ĺakaw nu buju Ē~ ° ¶aj ¶ajr~…ĺimwar~…ĺ a pa-si bujuan, u r~…ĺin-ńß…ô-kuo- ¶iw-k…ô kapur~…ĺuŇčan nu kitaki kańß…ôtikan nu babar~…ĺak. pa-si-r~…ĺi-ja u kitakid nu satabakiaj tus…ôp a s…ô- ¶i nu nikadanaj nisaŇčaan a tukaj. ¶ajsiwr~…ĺimnum katukuńß ¶ajsiwr~…ĺims…ôp, u bar~…ĺuńßaj a nijadu Ē~ °an, mikijaku tu tukaj a wajwaj tu nipatid…ôŇč, namańßida sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč sa ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° a misiki tina papatid…ôŇčan atu am…ôr~…ĺik ma ¶unus ku tad…ômaw a nikasiŇčaŇčanan, ¶ajsiwnums…ôp mińß ¶aan s…ôpat a bur~…ĺad tu ¶aj d…ômiad, maŇčar~…ĺaj pakaam…ôr~…ĺik ku pa-si tu nikar~…ĺańßatan, u tawjaaj nu tukaj r~…ĺi-j…ô-z…ô-n…ô-r~…ĺu mabur~…ĺaw tajdan i pa-si-r~…ĺi-ja. . kijaku tu tukaj **** pa-si-r~…ĺi-ja miida tu kijaku nu tukaj atu kijaku a nipańß…ôtikan nu babar~…ĺaki a nikat…ôŇčir~…ĺan, sakamu satu " ¶ajsiwr~…ĺimn…ôm mińß ¶aan pa-si-r~…ĺi-ja papatid…ôŇčan u pa-si a tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan, ¶inida ńßan tu nisikian a sakańß…ôm…ôkan. mikijakuaj tu tukaj a tad…ômaw ¶i r~…ĺu-si-aw.k…ô-s…ô-ta atu ¶i aw-s…ô-ka.ni-maj-j…ô u misikiaj tu tukaj a tad…ômaw, namaka nijadu Ē~ °an atu sin- ¶…ôn kitidaan a nipisaŇčaan katukuńß tu nipatid…ôŇč tu r~…ĺumaan a nikasir~…ĺa ¶an, pa-si-r~…ĺi-ja sakamusa mańßida u wajwaj nu ajam. mańßida patańß…ôkar~…ĺaj namakatukaj a suŇčaaj a nabar~…ĺu ¶uan a nisikian, duma satu nisaŇčaan tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu sińßu sakańß…ôm…ôkan nu nabar~…ĺu ¶uan sa." ." r~…ĺikisi ** saan i r~…ĺikisi pa-si naitida i sa-…ô-wa-tuo atu r~…ĺi-ju-z…ô-n…ô-r~…ĺu tusa a sadipasaj nu tukaj a mar~…ĺatukaj. ¶ajsiwr~…ĺimn…ôm mińß ¶aan pa-si ¶uŇč-tun ¶i zu-saj-r~…ĺi-nuo. ku-pi- ¶i-k…ô sakamusa a patid…ôŇč tu pa-si-r~…ĺi-ja. maminsaŇčan mikijaku tu tukaj a tad…ômaw ¶i r~…ĺu-si-aw. k…ô-s…ô-ta "r~…ĺ* ¶io ¶osta", ma ¶ima ¶ian a nikapur~…ĺuŇčan a nisaŇčaan u misaŇčaaj a tad…ômaw ¶i aw-s…ô-ka. ni-maj-j…ô " pasu satar~…ĺakawaj a pikajgian, ¶uŇč-tun-ńßu, satar~…ĺakawaj a ńßuiŇč, sakaj ńß…ôkar~…ĺan pu, s…ô-ńßua-pu, r~…ĺuma nu ¶uŇč-tun, tabakiaj a kiukaj", misikiaj tu sakaj ńß…ôkar~…ĺan ¶i bsb". (r~…ĺ* ¶io ¶osta), *ob…ôrto burr~…ĺ…ô mar*. ",***"bsb". kitidaan ** pa-si-r~…ĺi-ja kitidaan nu timur~…ĺan ***** "**.***", nutipan ***** "**.***", itida i sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu tar~…ĺakawan ¶…ôs…ôps…ôps…ôp a pa-si t…ôban nu k…ô-ja-s…ô- ¶uo nu bujuan, ma-r~…ĺa-ni-ni-wuŇč sauwa ¶ atu wi-…ô-d…ô sauwa ¶ nu kar~…ĺar~…ĺit…ômuańß a masaŇčkakuaj nu kitidaan. ¶ajsiwwar~…ĺpi ¶ mińß ¶aan ¶ajtu bur~…ĺad pitu a d…ômiad, r~…ĺin-ńß…ô-kuo ¶iaw-k…ô-w…ôn- ¶u mińßapu pa-si-r~…ĺi-ja u r~…ĺiwan nu babar~…ĺaki a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nu kitakidan. ** ¶ajsiwnums…ôp mińß ¶aan mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu r~…ĺan-paŇč- ¶…ôn-ńßu ¶…ô-r~…ĺi-j…ô-z…ô-nia-r~…ĺu mabur~…ĺaw tajdan i pa-si-r~…ĺi-ju a kun-mu-iŇč, u nuńß…ôni atu ir~…ĺu ¶ itida namin nu ma ¶ian a sikusia mu…ôn…ôŇč, nuajawan nu "paranoa" a banaw nu ajawan a "r~…ĺago sur~…ĺ" u nu ¶anan a kanatar~…ĺan itida i pa-si nu tapaŇč a kitidaan atu tapaŇč nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a sikusia mu…ôn…ôŇč. tawja patid…ôŇčaj tinabar~…ĺuńßaj nu mikur~…ĺiaj a tad…ômaw atu ir~…ĺu ¶ itida namin mu…ôn…ôŇč i wi-sin- ¶…ôn, idaw ku r~…ĺimaaj nu wi-sin- ¶…ôn mar~…ĺakuuj tu ¶ajwaŇč nu tad…ômawan, satabakiaj nu wi-sin- ¶…ôn u taguatiŇča. duma ńßantu , idaw ku dumaaj a tad…ômaw itida i mir~…ĺawaaj tu pa-si-r~…ĺi-ja a "goi*s" nijaduan,pasu "agua ¶r~…ĺara". **** ,paranoa****r~…ĺago sur~…ĺ taguatiŇča. goi*s***,*agua ¶r~…ĺara. siki ** k…ô-s…ô-ta u pa-si-r~…ĺi-ja kakapańß ku nipikijaku, nipatuduan tu kitidaan nu pajr~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° atu sasiwbajan a nikak…ônińßan, a ¶aaj patid…ôŇč tu kakur~…ĺian a kitidaan, atu u ¶anan nu sasaŇčaan tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° aj ¶uwa ńßakija par~…ĺuma Ē~ ° atu tar~…ĺakaw nu nisaŇčaan tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an. ¶i k…ô-s…ô-ta pa ¶i ¶i i pa-si-r~…ĺi-ja nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺan tat…ôŇča mańßida u adipapaŇč, nika ńßatidaaj tu nu tad…ômaw mańßida u ńßikuki sa. "ńßikuki" a "udip" u sińßu kujda, kuo-ńßua atu duma nu sińßuan nu pur~…ĺuŇč a papatid…ôŇčan tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, idaw ku nisikian ni ni-maj ku sakaj ¶ir~…ĺa ¶ir~…ĺaan a kiwkaj. i ma ¶ima ¶ian idaw ku tar~…ĺakawaj nu tir~…ĺibian, i pabaw ńßan maadińß nu mita ku nabakuan atu banaw nu wajwajan. "sakubat" paŇčaŇčan ńßan timur~…ĺ atu amis nu sakubatan, tanaju Ē~ ° makaar~…ĺa tu pitu a kunr~…ĺian. ,******. ¶a ¶aj nu ańß…ôbar~…ĺaj a kaw-su Ē~ ° dadan mir~…ĺitin tu timur~…ĺ amis nu sakubatan, t…ôban mir~…ĺawit tu t…ôban nu paŇčir~…ĺuan nu basu, itida ńßan u giŇčku atu tatajda mukan tu pańßan a patijamaj. t…ôpar~…ĺ nu tabakiaj a dadan judańß ku r~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an, u siwbaj ku mik…ônińßaj, r~…ĺaŇčdawaj atu kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan sakajdińßan sa. mi ¶api tu pańßikukian idaw ku aadupan nu aidaŇčan. ta-s…ô-kun, kan-r~…ĺ…ô-ńßua kapańßaj nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an itida i t…ôpar~…ĺ nu banaw, idaw ku ¶a ¶aj mi ¶id…ôkaj a aaidaŇčan. . sakaudip ** saan ku m…ôs…ô sasapar~…ĺitaan a sakaudip u sat…ôk…ôsaj nu ma ¶ian, tus…ôp ¶ajtu mińß ¶aan pa-si-r~…ĺi-ja u sakaj kitakidan u saka sipr~…ĺim nu sat…ôk…ôsaj a tukajan, mańßida u tus…ôp ¶ajs…ôp mińß ¶aan u saka pitu a bataan nu kitidaan , itini i s…ôn-paw-r~…ĺuo ńßan sabaw tusa atu r~…ĺi-j…ô-z…ô Ē~ °-n…ôi-r~…ĺu saka sabaw tur~…ĺu. (***)**. #%…ô*%* ¶%b*%…ô*%**%**
S.FORM: == Pa-si-li-ya Ś∑īŤ•ŅŚą©šļě == Pa-si-li-ya "Pu-taw-ya a kamu: Bras√≠lia (b…ĺa'zilj…ź)", u kamuac Pa-si-li-ya. u Pa-si a tukay, itida i talakaw nu buyu' caycaylimwal a pa-si buyuan, u Lin-he-kuo-ciw-ke kapulungan nu kitaki kahetikan nu babalak. Pa-si-li-ya u kitakid nu satabakiay tusep a se-ci nu nikadanay nisangaan a tukay. Ś∑īŤ•ŅŚą©šļě(ŤĎ°ŤźĄÁČôŤ™ě:Bras√≠lia (b…ĺa'zilj…ź)), . amica tu lingatu limwan ku tademaw a nipisikian tu kanadtal a cen-ce tatelungan, nika katukuh tu tusepcaysiw mihcaan, tademaw nu Pa-si-li-ya milakuuyt tu 3,000,000 ku tademaw,mapataayaw tu sakatulu nu Pa-si a tukayan, La-men a sakalima nu tukay, pulung nu sakaudip sakatulu nu Pa-si, La-men sakalima, i La-men tukayan a tademaw nu pulung a sakasilaculan nu sakaudip u satalakaway, nu 25,500 kalisiw nu amuhaun. ,Áāļ25,500ÁĺéŚÖÉ. patideng tina tukayan nu Pa-si-li-ya i caysiwlimnum katukuh caysiwlimsep, u baluhay a niyadu'an, mikiyaku tu tukay a wayway tu nipatideng, namahida saicelang sa ku balucu' a misiki tina papatidengan atu amelik macunus ku tademaw a nikasinganganan, caysiwnumsep mihcaan sepat a bulad tucay demiad, mangalay pakaamelik ku Pa-si tu nikalahatan, u tawyaay nu tukay Li-ye-ze-ne-lu mabulaw taydan i Pa-si-li-ya. . kiyaku tu tukay Ť¶ŹŚäÉŚüéŚłā Pa-si-li-ya miida tu kiyaku nu tukay atu kiyaku a nipahetikan nu babalaki a nikatengilan, sakamu satu " caysiwlimnem mihcaan Pa-si-li-ya papatidengan u Pa-si a tatelungan, cinida han tu nisikian a sakahemekan. mikiyakuay tu tukay a tademaw ci Lu-si-aw.Ke-se-ta atu ci Aw-se-ka.Ni-may-ye u misikiay tu tukay a tademaw, namaka niyadu'an atu sin-cen kitidaan a nipisangaan katukuh tu nipatideng tu lumaan a nikasilacan, Pa-si-li-ya sakamusa mahida u wayway nu ayam. mahida patahekalay namakatukay a sungaay a nabalucuan a nisikian, duma satu nisangaan tu luma' nu sihu sakahemekan nu nabalucuan sa." ." likisi ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ saan i likisi Pa-si naitida i Sa-e-wa-tuo atu Li-yu-ze-ne-lu tusa a sadipasay nu tukay a malatukay. caysiwlimnem mihcaan Pa-si cung-tun ci Zu-say-li-nuo. Ku-pi-ci-ke sakamusa a patideng tu Pa-si-li-ya. maminsangan mikiyaku tu tukay a tademaw ci Lu-si-aw. Ke-se-ta "L√ļcio Costa", macimacian a nikapulungan a nisangaan u misangaay a tademaw ci Aw-se-ka. Ni-may-ye " pasu satalakaway a pikaygian, cung-tun-hu, satalakaway a huing, sakay hekalan pu, se-hua-pu, luma nu cung-tun, tabakiay a kiukay", misikiay tu sakay hekalan ci Roberto Burle Marx. tukay a nipisikian u nidatengan ni Ke-pi ku sapalekal. nipatidengan nu Pa-si-li-ya namaka caysiwlimnem mihcaan , katukau i caysiwnemsep mihcaan a mahedek, sipcay a buladan a mahedek. sipakay pabaw a miadih mahida u hikuki atu adipapang ku wayway adihan. ninatukay pangangan han u Lin-pang tukay, nu madayumay a nakamuan han u " BSB". (L√ļcio Costa), Roberto Burle Marx. ",śąĖÁį°Á®Ī"BSB". kitidaan ŚúįÁźÜ pa-si-li-ya kitidaan nu timulan 15¬į45 "15.75¬į", nutipan 47¬į57 "47.95¬į", itida i sakalecad nu talakawan ceysepsepsep a Pa-si teban nu Ke-ya-se-cuo nu buyuan, Ma-la-ni-ni-wung sauwac atu Wi-e-de sauwac nu kalalitemuah a masangkakuay nu kitidaan. caysiwwalpic mihcaan caytu bulad pitu a demiad, Lin-he-kuo ciaw-ke-wen-cu mihapu pa-si-li-ya u liwan nu babalaki a lalangawan nu kitakidan. 60 caysiwnumsep mihcaan mikilul tu Lan-pang-cen-hu ce-li-ye-ze-nia-lu mabulaw taydan i Pa-si-li-yu a kun-mu-ing, u nuheni atu iluc itida namin nu macian a sikusia mueneng, nuayawan nu "Paranoa" a banaw nu ayawan a "Lago Sul" u nucanan a kanatalan itida i Pa-si nu tapang a kitidaan atu tapang nu hekal a sikusia mueneng. tawya patidengay tinabaluhay nu mikuliay a tademaw atu iluc itida namin mueneng i Wi-sin-cen, idaw ku limaay nu Wi-sin-cen malakuuy tu caywang nu tademawan, satabakiay nu Wi-sin-cen u Taguatinga. duma hantu , idaw ku dumaay a tademaw itida i milawaay tu Pa-si-li-ya a "Goi√°s" niyaduan,pasu "Agua Clara". 1960 ,ParanoaśĻĖŚįćŚ≤łÁöĄLago Sul Taguatinga. Goi√°sŚ∑ěŚüéťéģ,Ś¶āAgua Clara. siki Ť®≠Ť®ą Ke-se-ta u Pa-si-li-ya kakapah ku nipikiyaku, nipatuduan tu kitidaan nu paylumaluma' atu sasiwbayan a nikakenihan, a caay patideng tu kakulian a kitidaan, atu u canan nu sasangaan tu luma' aycuwa hakiya paluma' atu talakaw nu nisangaan tu luma'an. ci Ke-se-ta pacici i Pa-si-li-ya nu hekalan tatenga mahida u adipapang, nika hatidaay tu nu tademaw mahida u hikuki sa. "hikuki" a "udip" u sihu kuyda, kuo-hua atu duma nu sihuan nu pulung a papatidengan tu luma', idaw ku nisikian ni Ni-may ku sakay cilacilaan a kiwkay. i macimacian idaw ku talakaway nu tilibian, i pabaw han maadih nu mita ku nabakuan atu banaw nu waywayan. "sakubat" pangangan han timul atu amis nu sakubatan, tanayu' makaala tu pitu a kunlian. ,ŚźĄÁīĄ7ŚÖ¨ťáĆťē∑. cacay nu ahebalay a kaw-su' dadan militin tu timul amis nu sakubatan, teban milawit tu teban nu pangiluan nu basu, itida han u gingku atu tatayda mukan tu pahan a patiyamay. tepal nu tabakiay a dadan yudah ku lumaluma'an, u siwbay ku mikenihay, langdaway atu kilakilangan sakaydihan sa. micapi tu pahikukian idaw ku aadupan nu aidangan. Ta-se-kun, kan-le-hua kapahay nu luma'an itida i tepal nu banaw, idaw ku cacay micidekay a aaidangan. . sakaudip Á∂ďśŅü saan ku mese sasapalitaan a sakaudip u satekesay nu macian, tusepcaytu mihcaan Pa-si-li-ya u sakay kitakidan u saka siplim nu satekesay a tukayan, mahida u tusepcaysep mihcaan u saka pitu a bataan nu kitidaan , itini i Sen-paw-luo han sabaw tusa atu Li-ye-ze'-nei-lu saka sabaw tulu. (Á¨¨13)šĻčŚĺĆ. #%E5%9C%B0%E7%90%86
